title: The Reincarnation of Isabel
original_title: Riti, magie nere e segrete orge nel trecento...
overview: Isabel is a dead vampire and witch whose body is hanging in a basement while the owner tries to kidnap virgins for a sacrifice that could mean Isabel’s resurrection. But doing this won’t be easy as the women aren’t gonna give in very easily.
